stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:copper-library.fixture 2025 annual report new library cards issued

stages.purpose: Search the resolved organization's corpus for the relevant primary source.
Read the primary document rather than relying on a search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
Report exactly 18,406 new library cards and cite the fetched annual report.
Do not restate the figure as unique new patrons.

prompt: Identify the authoritative library system for Copper County, then fetch its primary 2025 annual report and state the number of new library cards issued. Use the report’s exact metric; do not interpret it as unique new patrons.

results.title: Official site — Copper County Library District

search_2.query: site:copper-library.fixture 2025 annual report new library cards issued

fetch_1.title: 2025 Annual Report
fetch_1.content: The district issued 18,406 new library cards in 2025. The report notes that replacement cards are excluded, but it does not equate cards with unique new patrons.
